title: Temperature-dependent k(T) slab: Dirichlet base, Robin tip, element-mean evaluation
notes: k(T) is the piecewise-linear interpolation of the declared knots (a single linear segment here). Both codes evaluate k once per element at the element-mean temperature (the declared discretization) and drive the nonlinearity by undamped Picard iteration to the declared tolerance, so agreement checks independent nonlinear-iteration/assembly/solver implementations.
